LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-17-2020 HEARING RE: PETITIONERS JULIE DITTO AND FRANK DITTO'S AMENDED PETITION FOR A PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE OF JULIE & FRANK DITTO SEEKING REVIEW OF COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL OF THE RESOLVED OFFSET OF APPEAL (CSM-19-861987), THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. JULIE AND FRANK DITTO'S "AMENDED PETITION FOR PREMPATORY [SIC] WRIT OF MANDATE" IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR PENDING THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT HEARING SCHEDULED FOR AUGUST 14, 2020. I CONCUR WITH RESPONDENTS' VIEW THAT PETITIONERS' ISSUES CAN BE RAISED IN THE SMALL CLAIMS CASE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR#5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Of Amended Petition For A Peremptory Writ Of Mandate Of Julie & Frank Ditto Seeking Review Of Collateral Estoppel Of The Resolved Offset Of Appeal (Csm 19-861987)
Off Calendar Jul-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS JULIE DITTO AND FRANK DITTO'S Amended Petition For A Peremptory Writ Of Mandate Of Julie & Frank Ditto Seeking Review Of Collateral Estoppel Of The Resolved Offset Of Appeal (CSM-19-861987).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Julie and Frank Ditto's "amended petition for prempatory [sic] writ of mandate" is ordered off calendar pending the small claims court hearing scheduled for August 14, 2020. I concur with respondents' view that petitioners' issues can be raised in the small claims case.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For A Premptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Off Calendar
